title: relay agents.pool.yml
description: Configuration schema for relay agent pool personas

language.description: Default response language for all agents (e.g. 'Korean', 'English', 'Japanese'). Can be overridden per agent.

shared_blocks.description: Reusable text blocks for systemPrompt templates. Reference as {{block_name}} in agent systemPrompts. {agent_id} within blocks is auto-substituted with the actual agent ID.

review_checklist.description: Default review checklist for all agents. Injected into reviewer context at spawn time. Can be overridden per agent.

agents.description: Agent persona overrides. Keys are agent IDs.

name.description: Display name shown in the dashboard

description.description: One-line description of the agent's role

tools.description: MCP tool names this agent is allowed to call

systemPrompt.description: System prompt injected into the agent at session start

language.description: Override the global language for this specific agent (e.g. 'English')

disabled.description: When true, this agent is excluded from the registry entirely

extends.description: Inherit all fields from another agent ID, then apply overrides

tags.description: Taxonomy tags for pool-based team selection (e.g. ['frontend', 'web'])

hooks.description: Task lifecycle hooks. Set to false to opt out of inherited hooks.

validate_prompt.description: Validation criteria injected before task completion. Agent checks all criteria before marking done.

review_checklist.description: Override the global review checklist for this specific agent.

before_task.description: Shell command(s) run before claim_task. Non-zero exit blocks claiming.

after_task.description: Shell command(s) run after update_task(status: 'done'). Non-zero exit reverts status.
